name: Bomb
desc: Summons a bomb that destroys ground very efficiently
descZh: 召唤一枚破坏地面极为高效的炸弹

name: Spark bolt
desc: A weak but enchanting sparkling projectile
descZh: 弱小但带有迷人闪烁的投射物

name: Spark bolt with trigger
desc: A spark bolt that casts another spell upon collision
descZh: 在碰撞时施放另一法术的火花弹

name: Spark bolt with double trigger
nameZh: 带有双重触发的火花弹
desc: A spark bolt that casts two new spells upon collision
descZh: 在碰撞时施放两个全新法术的火花弹

name: Spark bolt with timer
desc: A spark bolt that casts another spell after a timer runs out
descZh: 在定时结束后施放另一法术的火花弹

name: Magic arrow
desc: A handy magical arrow
descZh: 好用的魔法箭

name: Magic arrow with trigger
desc: A magical arrow that casts another spell upon collision
descZh: 在碰撞时施放另一法术的魔法箭

name: Magic arrow with timer
desc: A magical arrow that casts another spell after a timer runs out
descZh: 在定时结束后施放另一法术的魔法箭

name: Magic bolt
desc: A powerful magical bolt
descZh: 强力的魔法弹

name: Magic bolt with trigger
desc: A powerful magical bolt that casts another spell upon collision
descZh: 在碰撞时施放另一法术的强力魔法弹

name: Magic bolt with timer
desc: A powerful magical bolt that casts another spell after a timer runs out
descZh: 在定时结束后施放另一法术的强力魔法弹

name: Burst of air
desc: A brittle burst of air capable of greatly pushing objects
descZh: 能够大幅推动物体的一道气流

name: Energy orb
desc: A slow but powerful orb of energy
descZh: 缓慢而强大的能量球体

name: Energy orb with a trigger
desc: A slow but powerful orb of energy that casts another spell upon collision
descZh: 缓慢而强大的能量球体，在碰撞时施放另一法术

name: Energy orb with a timer
desc: A slow but powerful orb of energy that casts another spell after a timer runs out
descZh: 缓慢而强大的能量球体，在定时结束后施放另一法术

name: Hookbolt
desc: A glowing hook that pulls the caster towards itself upon collision
descZh: 发光的钩子，会在碰撞时将施法者拉向自己

name: Black hole
desc: A slow orb of void that eats through all obstacles
descZh: 缓慢的虚无球体，会吞噬沿路的一切障碍

name: Black Hole with Death Trigger
desc: A slow orb of void that eats through all obstacles and casts another spell as it expires
descZh: 缓慢的虚无球体，会吞噬沿路的一切障碍，并在消散时释放另一法术

name: White hole
desc: An orb of positive energy that destroys everything in its path
descZh: 一个正面能量球体，摧毁所及的一切

name: Giga black hole
desc: A growing orb of negative energy that destroys everything in its reach
descZh: 不断增长的负面能量球体，摧毁所及的一切

name: Giga white hole
desc: A growing orb of positive energy that destroys everything in its reach
descZh: 不断增长的正面能量球体，摧毁所及的一切

name: Omega Black Hole
desc: Even light dies eventually...
descZh: 即使光也终将灭亡...

name: Omega white hole
desc: A massive orb of positive energy that destroys everything in its reach
descZh: 一个巨大的正面能量球体，摧毁所及的一切

name: Eldritch portal
desc: Summons a one-way portal to a sinister realm
descZh: 召唤一座通往险恶境地的单向传送门

name: Spitter bolt
desc: A short-lived magical bolt
descZh: 寿命短暂的魔法弹

name: Spitter bolt with timer
desc: A short-lived magical bolt that casts another spell after a timer runs out
descZh: 在过去一段时间后施放另一法术的寿命短暂魔法弹

name: Large spitter bolt
desc: A more powerful version of Spitter Bolt
descZh: 分裂弹的更强大版本

name: Large spitter bolt with timer
nameZh: 带有定时的大型分裂弹
desc: A more powerful version of Spitter Bolt that casts another spell after a timer runs out
descZh: 在定时结束后施放另一法术的更强大版本分裂弹

name: Giant spitter bolt
desc: The most powerful version of Spitter Bolt
descZh: 最强大形式的分裂弹

name: Giant spitter bolt with timer
nameZh: 带有定时的巨型分裂弹
desc: The most powerful version of Spitter Bolt that casts another spell after a timer runs out
descZh: 在定时结束后施放另一法术的最强大版本分裂弹

name: Bubble spark
desc: A bouncy, inaccurate spell
descZh: 弹性十足但不够准确的法术

name: Bubble spark with trigger
desc: A bouncy, inaccurate spell that casts another spell upon collision
descZh: 弹性十足但不够准确的法术，在碰撞时施放另一法术

name: Disc projectile
desc: Summons a sharp disc projectile
descZh: 召唤锐利的碟状投射物

name: Giga disc projectile
desc: Summons a large, serrated disc with a curious flight pattern
descZh: 召唤一个飞行方式的大型带锯齿飞碟

name: Summon Omega Sawblade
desc: That's a lot of sawblade
descZh: 真的是很多的锯刃

name: Energy sphere
desc: A fast, arcing projectile
descZh: 快速的弧线行进投射物

name: Energy sphere with timer
desc: A fast, arcing projectile that casts another spell after a timer runs out
descZh: 在定时结束后施放另一法术的弧线行进快速投射物

name: Bouncing burst
desc: A very bouncy projectile
descZh: 极具弹跳力的投射物

name: Arrow
desc: Summons an arrow
descZh: 召唤一支箭矢

name: Pollen
desc: A small, floating projectile that homes towards nearby creatures
descZh: 小小的飘浮投射物，向附近的生物追踪而去

name: Glowing lance
desc: A magical lance that cuts through soft materials
descZh: 一支能够穿透柔软材料的魔法长枪

name: Holy Lance
desc: A fast-flying, penetrating lance that glows with power
descZh: 快速飞行、穿透力极强的长枪，闪耀着力量的光芒

name: Magic missile
desc: A fiery, explosive projectile
descZh: 炽烈易爆的投射物

name: Large magic missile
desc: A more powerful version of Magic missile
descZh: 魔法飞弹的更强大版本

name: Giant magic missile
desc: The most powerful version of Magic missile
descZh: 最强大形式的魔法飞弹

name: Firebolt
desc: A bouncy, explosive bolt
descZh: 具备弹跳能力的爆炸性魔法弹

name: Firebolt with trigger
desc: A bouncy, explosive bolt that that casts another spell upon collision
descZh: 具备弹跳能力的爆炸性魔法弹，在碰撞时施放另一法术

name: Large firebolt
desc: A more powerful version of Firebolt
descZh: 火焰弹的更强大版本

name: Giant firebolt
desc: The most powerful version of Firebolt
descZh: 最强大形式的火焰弹

name: Odd Firebolt
desc: A somewhat peculiar bouncy, explosive bolt
descZh: 特别能弹跳的爆炸魔法弹

name: Dropper bolt
desc: A very heavy explosive bolt
descZh: 极为沉重的爆炸魔法弹

name: Unstable crystal
desc: A crystal that explodes when someone comes nearby
descZh: 有人来到近旁便会爆炸的晶体

name: Unstable crystal with trigger
desc: A crystal that explodes and casts another spell when someone comes nearby
descZh: 有人来到近旁便会爆炸，同时施放另一法术的晶体

name: Dormant crystal
desc: A crystal that explodes when caught in an explosion
descZh: 被爆炸波及便会爆炸的晶体

name: Dormant crystal with trigger
desc: A crystal that explodes and casts another spell when caught in an explosion
descZh: 被爆炸波及便会爆炸，同时施放另一法术的晶体

name: Summon fish
desc: FISH!
descZh: 是鱼！

name: Summon deercoy
desc: Summons a seemingly-innocuous deer
descZh: 召唤一只看上去无害的鹿

name: Flock of Ducks
desc: Summons a chaotic flock of spicy ducks
descZh: 召唤一群无秩序的火辣鸭子

name: Worm Launcher
desc: Summons a giant worm to cause havoc for a moment!
descZh: 召唤一条巨型蠕虫大闹特闹！

name: Explosive Detonator
desc: All nearby explosive spells cast by you instantly detonate
descZh: 附近你施放的所有易爆法术立即引爆

name: Concentrated light
desc: A pinpointed beam of light
descZh: 汇聚起来的一束光线

name: Intense concentrated light
desc: A spectral wand is summoned that casts a huge beam of light
descZh: 召唤一把施放巨大光束的幽魂魔杖

name: Lightning bolt
desc: The primordial force of nature
descZh: 大自然的原始力量

name: Ball Lightning
desc: Summons three short range electrical orbs
descZh: 召唤三个短射程的电球

name: Plasma beam
desc: An instantaneous, dangerous beam of light
descZh: 即时的一束危险光线

name: Plasma Beam Cross
desc: Four deadly plasma beams in a cross-shape. Look out, they can hurt you as well!
descZh: 四道致命的电浆束组成十字。小心，它们也会一样伤到你自己！

name: Plasma Cutter
desc: A plasma beam specialized in cutting materials!
descZh: 专长切割材料的电浆束！

name: Digging bolt
desc: A bolt that is ideal for mining operations
descZh: 采矿作业的理想魔弹

name: Digging blast
desc: More powerful digging
descZh: 更强的挖掘力

name: Chainsaw
desc: A good tool for cutting meat. Also has some magical properties...
descZh: 切肉的不错工具。同时也有一些魔法属性...

name: Luminous drill
desc: A pinpointed, short-ranged beam of concentrated light
descZh: 尖锐的短射程汇聚光束

name: Luminous drill with timer
desc: A pinpointed, short-ranged beam of concentrated light that casts another spell after a timer runs out
descZh: 在定时结束后施放另一法术的短射程尖锐汇聚光束

name: Summon Tentacle
desc: Calls a terrifying appendage from another dimension
descZh: 召唤一条来自异次元的绵延之物

name: Summon Tentacle with timer
desc: Calls a terrifying appendage from another dimension! Comes with a timer
descZh: 召唤一条来自异次元的绵延之物！附带定时

name: Healing bolt
desc: A magical bolt with rejuvenative powers
descZh: 带有复生之力的魔法弹

name: Deadly heal
desc: A projectile that at first deals damage, then heals over time
descZh: 起初会造成伤害，然后开始持续治疗的投射物

name: Spiral shot
desc: A mystical whirlwind of magic sparks
descZh: 魔法火花的神秘旋涡

name: Magic guard
desc: Four guarding lights rotate around you for a time
descZh: 四道护卫之光在你周围旋转一段时间

name: Big magic guard
desc: Eight guarding lights rotate around you for a time
descZh: 八道护卫之光在你周围旋转一段时间

name: Chain bolt
desc: Fires a mysterious bolt that jumps from enemy to enemy
descZh: 发射会在敌人之间跳跃的神秘魔弹

name: Fireball
desc: A powerful exploding spell
descZh: 强力的爆炸法术

name: Meteor
desc: A destructive projectile from the skies!
descZh: 从天而降的毁灭性投射物！

name: Flamethrower
desc: A stream of fire!!
descZh: 一道火流！

name: Iceball
desc: A magical ball of frozen fire
descZh: 冻结火焰的魔法球

name: Slimeball
desc: A dripping ball of poisonous slime
descZh: 有毒粘液的湿漉漉球体

name: Path of dark flame
desc: A trail of dark, deadly flames
descZh: 致命黑焰之迹

name: Summon missile
desc: A missile!!!
descZh: 一枚飞弹！！！

name: Summon rock spirit
desc: Summons an autonomous rock ally
descZh: 召唤一个自动行动的岩石伙伴

name: Dynamite
desc: Summons a small explosive
descZh: 召唤一枚小型爆炸物

name: Glitter bomb
desc: Summons a bomb that explodes into volatile fragments
descZh: 召唤一枚会爆炸成易燃碎片的炸弹

name: Triplicate bolt
desc: A formation of three small, fast bolts
descZh: 由三个小型快速魔弹组成

name: Freezing gaze
desc: A heart-freezingly sinister aura
descZh: 令人心里发凉的险恶气氛

name: Pinpoint of light
desc: An extremely concentrated point of light that explodes after a moment
descZh: 光极度集中的一点，一段时间后爆炸

name: Prickly Spore Pod
desc: Summons a spore pod that attaches to a surface and then grows and explodes into spikes
descZh: 召唤一个会附着在表面的孢子荚，之后它会生长并爆出尖刺

name: Glue Ball
desc: A projectile that explodes into a sticky mess
descZh: 投射物爆炸为黏嗒嗒的一片

name: Holy Bomb
desc: Summons a bomb that... well...
descZh: 召唤一枚炸弹，效果嘛... 呃...

name: Giga Holy Bomb
desc: Bigger and therefore holier
descZh: 个头更大，神圣更足

name: Propane tank
desc: Summons a propane tank. Be careful what you wish for.
descZh: 召唤一个丙烷罐。许愿的时候，最好小心一点。

name: Bomb cart
desc: Summons a self-propeled mine cart loaded with explosives
descZh: 召唤一辆满载炸药的自推进矿车

name: Cursed sphere
desc: A projectile that brings bad luck to anyone it hits
descZh: 将厄运带给被击中者的投射物

name: Expanding Sphere
desc: A slow projectile that increases its damage over time
descZh: 随时间推移提高伤害的缓慢投射物

name: Earthquake
desc: Calls the anger of the earth
descZh: 呼唤大地的愤怒

name: Rock
desc: Create a mighty rock out of thin air
descZh: 强悍的岩石凭空出现

name: Summon egg
desc: Summons an egg that houses a friendly creature
descZh: 召唤育有友好生物的蛋

name: Summon hollow egg
desc: Summons an otherwise empty egg that casts a spell upon cracking open
descZh: 召唤一个空的蛋，在裂开之时释放法术

name: Summon Explosive Box
desc: Summons a box of explosive matter
descZh: 召唤一箱爆炸物质

name: Summon Large Explosive Box
desc: Summons a large box of explosive matter
descZh: 召唤一大箱爆炸物质

name: Summon fly swarm
desc: Summons five flies to aid you in battle
descZh: 召唤五只苍蝇，为你助战

name: Summon Firebug swarm
desc: Summons four fire bugs to aid you in battle
descZh: 召唤四只萤火虫，为你助战

name: Summon Wasp swarm
desc: Summon six wasps to aid you in battle
descZh: 召唤六只黄蜂，为你助战

name: Summon Friendly fly
desc: Summons a friendly fly that attacks your enemies!
descZh: 召唤一只友好的苍蝇，攻击你的敌人！

name: Acid ball
desc: A terrifying acidic projectile
descZh: 可怕的酸蚀投射物

name: Thunder charge
desc: A projectile with immense stored electricity
descZh: 储存有强大电力的投射物

name: Firebomb
desc: Slow, fiery bolt
descZh: 缓慢而炽烈的魔弹

name: Chunk of soil
desc: Don't soil yourself
descZh: 别把自己弄脏了

name: Death cross
desc: A deadly energy cross that explodes after a short time
descZh: 短暂时间后爆炸的致命能量十字

name: Giga death cross
desc: A giant, deadly energy cross that explodes after a short time
descZh: 短暂时间后爆炸的致命巨大能量十字

name: Infestation
desc: A bunch of magical sparks that fly in every direction
descZh: 一批魔法火花向各个方向飞去

name: Horizontal barrier
desc: A thin, horizontal barrier that harms passing creatures, including you
descZh: 一道薄薄的水平屏障伤害通过的生物 – 包括你在内

name: Vertical barrier
desc: A thin, vertical barrier that harms passing creatures, including you
descZh: 一道薄薄的垂直屏障伤害通过的生物 – 包括你在内

name: Square barrier
desc: A thin, square-shaped barrier that harms passing creatures, including you
descZh: 一道方形的垂直屏障伤害通过的生物 – 包括你在内

name: Summon Wall
desc: Summons a shortlived obstacle
descZh: 召唤持续时间很短的障碍物

name: Summon Platform
desc: Summons a shortlived bit of ground
descZh: 召唤持续时间很短的一点点地面

name: Glittering field
desc: Small explosions appear randomly over a large area
descZh: 在大区域内随机出现小型爆炸

name: Delayed spellcast
desc: A static, magical phenomenon that casts 3 extra spells after a short while
descZh: 静态的魔法现象，在短暂时间后施放 3 个额外法术

name: Long-distance cast
desc: Casts a spell some distance away from the caster
descZh: 在与施放者一定距离的位置施放法术

name: Teleporting cast
desc: Casts a spell from the closest enemy
descZh: 从最近的敌人位置施放法术

name: Warp cast
desc: Makes a spell immediately jump a long distance, stopped by walls
descZh: 令法术立即跳跃长距离，可受墙壁阻止

name: Inner spell
desc: Causes a projectile to be cast from where the caster is standing
descZh: 令投射物从施法者所站的位置射出

name: Toxic mist
desc: A cloud of toxic mist
descZh: 毒雾构成的云

name: mist of spirits
desc: A cloud of potent alcohol
descZh: 烈酒构成的云

name: Slime mist
desc: A cloud of slimy mist
descZh: 粘液雾构成的云

name: Blood mist
desc: A cloud of blood mist
descZh: 血雾构成的云

name: Circle of fire
desc: An expanding circle of burning air
descZh: 炽燃空气组成的扩散之环

name: Circle of acid
desc: An expanding circle of dripping acid
descZh: 滴落酸液组成的扩散之环

name: Circle of oil
desc: An expanding circle of slick oil
descZh: 粘滑酸液组成的扩散之环

name: Circle of water
desc: An expanding circle of water
descZh: 清水组成的扩散之环

name: Water
desc: Transmute drops of water from nothing
descZh: 凭空出现的水滴

name: Oil
desc: Transmute drops of oil from nothing
descZh: 凭空出现的油滴

name: Blood
desc: Blood blood blood
descZh: 是血呀，血！

name: Acid
desc: Transmute drops of acid from nothing
descZh: 凭空出现的酸液滴

name: Cement
desc: Transmute drops of wet cement from nothing
descZh: 凭空出现的湿水泥

name: Teleport bolt
desc: A magical bolt that moves you wherever it ends up flying
descZh: 将你传送到其结束飞行位置的魔法弹

name: Small Teleport Bolt
desc: A shortlived magical bolt that moves you wherever it ends up flying
descZh: 将你传送到其结束飞行位置的短时存在魔法弹

name: Return
desc: After a period of time, you'll be returned to where you cast this spell
descZh: 一段时间之后，返回施放这个法术的地方

name: Swapper
desc: It was theorized that the source of qualia would be transferred …But it turns out it was the whole body all along.
descZh: 从理论来将，性质的根源将会被转换... 但实际上，是整个身体被转换了。

name: Homebringer Teleport Bolt
desc: Brings the target hit closer to you
descZh: 将被击中的目标传送到离你更近的地方

name: Nuke
desc: Take cover!
descZh: 快找掩体！

name: Giga Nuke
desc: What do you expect?
descZh: 你还期待什么呢？

name: Fireworks!
desc: A fiery, explosive projectile
descZh: 炽烈易爆的投射物

name: Summon Taikasauva
desc: Summons a possessed wand to aid you
descZh: 召唤一把着魔魔杖，为你提供支援

name: Touch of Gold
desc: Transmutes everything in a short radius into gold, including walls, creatures... and you
descZh: 将短距离的一切转化为黄金，包括墙壁、生物... 还有你自己

name: Touch of Water
desc: Transmutes everything in a short radius into water, including walls, creatures... and you
descZh: 将短距离的一切转化为清水，包括墙壁、生物... 还有你自己

name: Touch of Oil
desc: Transmutes everything in a short radius into oil, including walls, creatures... and you
descZh: 将短距离的一切转化为油，包括墙壁、生物... 还有你自己

name: Touch of Spirits
desc: Transmutes everything in a short radius into alcohol, including walls, creatures... and you
descZh: 将短距离的一切转化为烈酒，包括墙壁、生物... 还有你自己

name: Touch of Gold?
desc: Transmutes everything in a short radius into urine, including walls, creatures... and you
descZh: 将周身附近的一切转化为尿液，包括墙壁、生物……还有你自己

name: Touch of Grass
desc: Transmutes everything in a short radius into Earth, including walls, creatures... and you. Unless…
descZh: 将周身附近的一切转化为土地，包括墙壁、生物……还有你自己。除非……

name: Touch of Blood
desc: Transmutes everything in a short radius into blood, including walls, creatures... and you
descZh: 将短距离的一切转化为鲜血，包括墙壁、生物... 还有你自己

name: Touch of Smoke
desc: Transmutes everything in a short radius into smoke, including walls, creatures... and you
descZh: 将短距离的一切转化为烟，包括墙壁、生物... 还有你自己

name: Destruction
desc: Instantly decimates foes around you, at the cost of your HP
descZh: 以自己的生命值为代价，立刻杀死周围的敌人

name: Muodonmuutos
desc: Baa
descZh: 咩阿

name: Double spell
desc: Simultaneously casts 2 spells
descZh: 同时施放 2 个法术

name: Triple spell
desc: Simultaneously casts 3 spells
descZh: 同时施放 3 个法术

name: Quadruple spell
desc: Simultaneously casts 4 spells
descZh: 同时施放 4 个法术

name: Octuple spell
desc: Simultaneously cast 8 spells
descZh: 同时施放 8 个法术

name: Myriad Spell
desc: Simultaneously casts as many spells as you have left uncast in your wand
descZh: 同时施放魔杖中所剩未施放的所有法术

name: Double scatter spell
desc: Simultaneously casts 2 spells with low accuracy
descZh: 同时施放 2 个法术，但精确度较低

name: Triple scatter spell
desc: Simultaneously casts 3 spells with low accuracy
descZh: 同时施放 3 个法术，但精确度较低

name: Quadruple scatter spell
desc: Simultaneously casts 4 spells with low accuracy
descZh: 同时施放 4 个法术，但精确度较低

name: Formation - behind your back
desc: Casts two spells: one ahead of and one behind the caster
descZh: 施放 2 个法术：在施术者前后各一

name: Formation - bifurcated
desc: Casts 2 spells in a bifurcated pattern
descZh: 以分叉形式施放 2 个法术

name: Formation - above and below
desc: Casts 3 spells - ahead, above and below the caster
descZh: 施放 3 个法术 - 分别位于施术者前方、上方和下方

name: Formation - trifurcated
desc: Casts 3 spells in a trifurcated pattern
descZh: 以三叉形式施放 3 个法术

name: Formation - hexagon
desc: Casts 6 spells in a hexagonal pattern
descZh: 以六边形施放 6 个法术

name: Formation - pentagon
desc: Casts 5 spells in a pentagonal pattern
descZh: 以五边形施放 5 个法术

name: Iplicate Spell
desc: Casts a copy of a projectile behind you, but the copy still cost mana
descZh: 在身后施放投射物的复制品，复制品同样消耗法术

name: Yplicate Spell
desc: Casts a copy of a projectile in a bifurcated pattern, but the copy still cost mana
descZh: 以分叉轨迹施放投射物的复制品，复制品同样消耗法力

name: Tiplicate Spell
desc: Casts copies of a projectile above and below you, but the copies still cost mana
descZh: 在你的上方和下方施放投射物的复制品，复制品同样消耗法术

name: Wuplicate Spell
desc: Casts copies of a projectile in a trifurcated pattern, but the copies still cost mana
descZh: 以三岔轨迹施放投射物的复制品，复制品同样消耗法力

name: Quplicate Spell
desc: Casts copies of a projectile in a tetragonal pattern, but the copies still cost mana
descZh: 以四边形轨迹施放投射物的复制品，复制品同样消耗法力

name: Peplicate Spell
desc: Casts 5 copies of a projectile in a pentagonal pattern, but the copies still cost mana
descZh: 以五边形轨迹施放5个投射物的复制品，复制品同样消耗法力

name: Heplicate Spell
desc: Casts 6 copies of a projectile in a hexagonal pattern, but the copies still cost mana
descZh: 以六边形轨迹施放6个投射物的复制品，复制品同样消耗法力

name: Reduce spread
desc: Reduces the spread of a spell
descZh: 降低投射物的散射

name: Heavy spread
desc: Gives a projectile a much lower cast delay, but no respect to your aim
descZh: 令投射物具有低上许多的施放延迟，但无视你的瞄准

name: Reduce recharge time
desc: Reduces the time between spellcasts
descZh: 缩减法术施放之间的时间间隔。

name: Increase lifetime
desc: Increases the lifetime of a spell
descZh: 延长法术的存在时间

name: Reduce lifetime
desc: Reduces the lifetime of a spell
descZh: 缩短法术的存在时间

name: Nolla
desc: The duration of a projectile is set to zero
descZh: 投射物的持续时间变为零

name: Slow But Steady
desc: The reload time of the wand is set to exactly 1.5 seconds
descZh: 魔杖的装填时间设定为 1.5 秒整

name: Remove Explosion
desc: Makes a projectile no longer explode
descZh: 让某个投射物不再会爆炸

name: Concentrated Explosion
desc: Limits the radius of a projectile's explosion heavily
descZh: 强力限制投射物的爆炸半径

name: Plasma Beam Enhancer
desc: Makes plasma beam spell's beam wider
descZh: 令电浆束法术的光束更宽

name: Add mana
desc: Adds 30 mana to the wand
descZh: 向魔杖增加 30 法力

name: Blood magic
desc: Reduces a spell's mana cost and recharge time greatly, at the costs of four health points
descZh: 以 4 点生命值为代价，大幅削减法术的法力消耗和充能时间

name: Gold to Power
desc: Spends 5% of your current gold and adds damage to a projectile proportional to the amount spent
descZh: 花费当前黄金的 5%，并根据所消耗的金额，为一个投射物增加伤害

name: Blood to Power
desc: A projectile gains additional damage at the cost of 20% of your health
descZh: 一个投射物以你生命值的 20% 为代价获得额外伤害

name: Spell duplication
desc: Duplicates every spell cast before it
descZh: 复制在之后施放的每个法术

name: Quantum Split
desc: Makes a projectile split into three projectiles whose existences are entangled
descZh: 令一个投射物分裂为三个投射物，其存在处于纠缠状态

name: Gravity
desc: Increases the effect gravity has on a projectile
descZh: 提高作用于投射物的重力

name: Anti-gravity
desc: Applies a lifting force to a projectile
descZh: 对投射物施加向上的力

name: Slithering path
desc: Makes a projectile move rapidly in a slithering manner, like a snake
descZh: 令投射物像蛇一样在空气中高速穿行

name: Chaotic path
desc: Causes a projectile to chaotically fly wherever it wishes
descZh: 令投射物混乱地随意飞行

name: Ping-pong path
desc: Makes a projectile fly back and forth
descZh: 令投射物前后飞行

name: Avoiding arc
desc: Makes a projectile shy away from obstacles
descZh: 令投射物回避障碍物

name: Floating arc
desc: Makes a projectile float above the ground
descZh: 令投射物在地面之上悬浮

name: Fly downwards
desc: Causes a projectile to aim straight downwards a short time after casting
descZh: 释放后，投射物在短时间后向下直直射去

name: Fly upwards
desc: Causes a projectile to aim straight upwards a short time after casting
descZh: 释放后，投射物在短时间后向上直直射去

name: Horizontal path
desc: Forces a projectile on a horizontal path, but increases its damage
descZh: 强制投射物以水平路径行进，但会增加其伤害

name: Linear arc
desc: Makes a projectile fly only in cardinal or diagonal lines
descZh: 令投射物仅能以横竖和对角线飞行

name: Orbiting Arc
desc: A projectile orbits the point of its origin
descZh: 围绕原点盘旋的一个投射物

name: Spiral Arc
desc: A projectile flies in a spiralling pattern
descZh: 以螺旋形式飞出的投射物

name: Phasing Arc
desc: Makes a projectile fly much slower, but teleport short distances over its flight
descZh: 令一个投射物的飞行速度大幅减慢，但在飞行过程中会短距离传送

name: True Orbit
desc: Makes a projectile rotate around the caster like an orbiting planet
descZh: 令投射物像绕轨道运行的行星一样绕施法者旋转

name: Bounce
desc: Makes a projectile bounce on impact
descZh: 令投射物在接触时弹跳

name: Remove Bounce
desc: A normally bouncy projectile stops doing so
descZh: 通常会弹跳的投射物不再会弹跳

name: Homing
desc: Makes a projectile accelerate towards your foes
descZh: 令投射物向你的敌人加速扑去

name: Anti Homing
desc: Makes a projectile accelerate away from your foes
descZh: 令投射物加速离开你的敌人

name: Wand Homing
desc: Makes a projectile accelerate towards wands
descZh: 令投射物向魔杖加速扑去

name: Short-range Homing
desc: A projectile flies towards targets when near them
descZh: 投射物在接近目标时向目标飞去

name: Rotate towards foes
desc: Makes a projectile turn towards your foes
descZh: 令投射物转向你的敌人

name: Boomerang
desc: Gives a projectile a path that curves towards you
descZh: 令投射物飞回你自己

name: Auto-Aim
desc: Makes a projectile turns towards the nearest visible enemy
descZh: 令投射物转向可视的最近敌人

name: Accelerative Homing
desc: A projectile homes towards enemies at an increasing pace
descZh: 一个投射物以更快速度向敌人追踪而去

name: Aiming Arc
desc: A projectile rotates towards the direction you're aiming
descZh: 向你瞄准方向旋转的投射物

name: Projectile Area Teleport
desc: If a valid target appears somewhere in the proximity of a projectile, the projectile will teleport right on top of the target
descZh: 如果在投射物附近出现有效目标，投射物会立即传送到目标的上方

name: Piercing shot
desc: Makes a projectile fly through enemies, but harmful to the caster
descZh: 令投射物能够飞行穿透敌人，但对施放者也可造成伤害

name: Drilling shot
desc: Gives a projectile the power to go through the ground
descZh: 为投射物赋予穿透地面的力量

name: Damage Plus
desc: Increases the damage done by a projectile
descZh: 提高法术造成的伤害

name: Random damage
desc: Randomly increases or lowers the damage done by projectiles
descZh: 随机提高或降低投射物造成的伤害

name: Bloodlust
desc: A projectile gains a hefty damage boost, but is also able to hurt you
descZh: 提供极大伤害加成的投射物，但同样也会伤害到你

name: Mana To Damage
desc: If the wand has more than 50 mana, all mana over that is converted into additional damage
descZh: 如果魔杖法力超过 50，则超过的法力会转化为额外的伤害

name: Critical Plus
desc: Gives a projectile +15% chance of a critical hit
descZh: 令投射物造成暴击的几率 +15%

name: Damage field
desc: Gives a projectile an energy field that constantly deals 3.5 damage to nearby creatures
descZh: 赋予投射物能量领域，对附近的生物不断造成 3.5 伤害

name: Spells to Power
desc: Converts any nearby projectiles cast by you into extra damage
descZh: 将附近自己施放的投射物转化为额外伤害

name: Essence to Power
desc: Increases a projectile's damage based on the number of creatures nearby
descZh: 根据附近的生物数量，提升一个投射物的伤害

name: Null shot
desc: Increases a projectile's duration dramatically but removes all damage & explosion from it
descZh: 大幅增加投射物的持续时间，但会移除其所有伤害和爆炸效果

name: Heavy Shot
desc: Greatly increases the damage done by a projectile, at the cost of its speed
descZh: 大幅提高法术造成的伤害，但降低其飞行速度

name: Light shot
desc: Makes a projectile move considerably faster, but deal less damage
descZh: 令投射物的移动速度变得相当快，但造成的伤害较低

name: Knockback
desc: Gives a projectile the power to knock back the foes it hits
descZh: 投射物命中的敌人将被击退

name: Recoil
desc: Increases the recoil when casting spells
descZh: 提高施放法术时的后座力

name: Recoil Damper
desc: Reduces the recoil when casting spells
descZh: 降低施放法术时的后座力

name: Speed Up
desc: Increases the speed at which a projectile flies through the air
descZh: 加快投射物的飞行速度

name: Accelerating shot
desc: Causes a projectile to accelerate as it flies
descZh: 令投射物在飞行时加速

name: Decelerating shot
desc: Makes a projectile decelerate as it flies
descZh: 令投射物在飞行时减速

name: Explosive projectile
desc: Makes a projectile more destructive to the environment
descZh: 令投射物对环境更具破坏性

name: Clusterbolt
desc: Makes a projectile release a cluster of explosive bolts upon hitting a wall
descZh: 使投射物在击中墙壁时释放爆炸弹群

name: Water to poison
desc: Makes any water within a projectile's range turns into poison
descZh: 投射物范围内的所有水体变为毒液

name: Blood to acid
desc: Makes any blood within a projectile's range turns into acid
descZh: 投射物范围内的所有血液变为酸液

name: Lava to blood
desc: Makes any lava within a projectile's range turn into blood
descZh: 投射物范围内的所有岩浆变为血液

name: Liquid Detonation
desc: Converts nearby nonmagical liquids into explosive gunpowder
descZh: 将附近的非魔法液体转化为爆炸性火药

name: Toxic sludge to acid
desc: Makes any toxic sludge within a projectile's range turn into acid
descZh: 投射物范围内的所有毒性淤泥变为酸液

name: Ground to sand
desc: Makes any hard, solid materials within a projectile's range turn into sand
descZh: 投射物范围内的所有坚硬结实材料变为砂粒

name: Chaotic transmutation
desc: Transmutes various liquids and powdery substances within a projectile's range into something else
descZh: 在投射物范围内转化各种液体和粉末物质为其他物质

name: Chaos magic
desc: Makes a projectile launch a random spell (out of a limited selection) when it hits something
descZh: 令投射物在击中物体时发出随机法术（选择有限）

name: Necromancy
desc: Makes corpses of creatures killed by a projectile rise to your aid
descZh: 复活被投射物杀死的生物尸体，让它们为你所用

name: Light
desc: Makes a projectile illuminate its surroundings
descZh: 令投射物可照亮周围

name: Explosion
desc: A powerful explosion
descZh: 强力的爆炸

name: Magical Explosion
desc: A large explosion that doesn't damage the ground
descZh: 不会破坏地面的大型爆炸

name: Explosion of brimstone
desc: A fiery explosion
descZh: 炽烈的爆炸

name: Explosion of poison
desc: An alchemical explosion
descZh: 化学性的爆炸

name: Explosion of spirits
desc: An inebriating explosion
descZh: 令人酩酊大醉的爆炸

name: Explosion of thunder
desc: An electric explosion
descZh: 电气性质的爆炸

name: Circle of fervour
desc: A field of berserk magic
descZh: 狂暴魔法的领域

name: Circle of transmogrification
desc: A field of sheep-like magic
descZh: 变羊魔法的领域

name: Circle of unstable metamorphosis
desc: A field of transformative magic
descZh: 变形魔法的领域

name: Circle of thunder
desc: A field of electrifying magic
descZh: 电击魔法的领域

name: Circle of stillness
desc: A field of freezing magic
descZh: 冻结魔法的领域

name: Circle of vigour
desc: A field of regenerative magic
descZh: 再生魔法的领域

name: Circle of displacement
desc: A field of teleportative magic
descZh: 传送魔法的领域

name: Circle of buoyancy
desc: A field of levitative magic
descZh: 飘浮魔法的领域

name: Circle of shielding
desc: A field of protective magic
descZh: 防护魔法的领域

name: Projectile transmutation field
desc: Projectiles caught within the field transform into harmless critters
descZh: 领域捕获到的投射物会转化为无害的小生物

name: Projectile thunder field
desc: Projectiles caught within the field transform into blasts of lightning
descZh: 领域捕获到的投射物会转化为闪电爆炸

name: Projectile gravity field
desc: Projectiles caught within the field are attracted towards its center
descZh: 领域捕获到的投射物会向领域中心聚拢

name: Powder Vacuum Field
desc: Sucks powder-like materials nearby and releases them upon expiring
descZh: 吸入附近的粉末状材料，并在失效时将它们释放

name: Liquid Vacuum Field
desc: Sucks liquid materials nearby and releases them upon expiring
descZh: 吸入附近的液体材料，并在失效时将它们释放

name: Vacuum Field
desc: Sucks nearby projectiles and creatures into the middle of the field instantaneously
descZh: 立即将附近的投射物和生物吸入力场的中心

name: Sea of lava
desc: Summons a large body of lava below the caster
descZh: 将施术者下方大片区域充满岩浆

name: Sea of alcohol
desc: Summons a large body of tasty alcohol below the caster
descZh: 将施术者下方大片区域充满美味酒液

name: Sea of oil
desc: Summons a large body of oil below the caster
descZh: 将施术者下方大片区域充满油

name: Sea of water
desc: Summons a large body of water below the caster
descZh: 将施术者下方大片区域充满水

name: Summon Swamp
desc: Summons a large swamp below the caster
descZh: 在施法者脚下召唤大片沼泽

name: Sea of acid
desc: Summons a large body of acid below the caster
descZh: 将施术者下方大片区域充满酸液

name: Sea of flammable gas
desc: Summons a large body of flammable gas below the caster
descZh: 将施术者下方大片区域充满可燃气体

name: Sea of Mimicium
desc: Summons a large body of mimicium under the caster
descZh: 在施法者脚下召唤一个巨大的拟态体

name: Rain cloud
desc: Creates a watery weather phenomenon
descZh: 产生降水天气现象

name: Oil cloud
desc: Creates a rain of oil
descZh: 产生一阵油液之雨

name: Blood cloud
desc: Creates a rain of blood
descZh: 产生一阵血雨

name: Acid cloud
desc: Creates an rain of acid
descZh: 产生一阵酸液之雨

name: Thundercloud
desc: Creates a stormy cloud
descZh: 产生一片雷云

name: Electric charge
desc: Gives a projectile an electric charge, that it will release on impact
descZh: 为投射物赋予电荷放射，令其在击中时散发

name: Matter eater
desc: Makes a projectile eat the environment as it flies
descZh: 令投射物吞噬飞行路线上的环境

name: Freeze charge
desc: Gives a projectile a frozen charge, that it will release on impact
descZh: 为投射物赋予冰冻放射，令其在击中时散发

name: Critical on burning
desc: Makes a projectile always do a critical hit on burning enemies
descZh: 令投射物对燃烧敌人始终暴击

name: Critical on wet (water) enemies
desc: Makes a projectile always do a critical hit on wet (water) enemies
descZh: 令投射物对潮湿（浸水）敌人始终暴击

name: Critical on oiled enemies
desc: Makes a projectile always do a critical hit on oiled enemies
descZh: 令投射物对油污敌人始终暴击

name: Critical on bloody enemies
desc: Makes a projectile always do a critical hit on bloody enemies
descZh: 令投射物对染血敌人始终暴击

name: Charm on toxic sludge
desc: Makes a projectile charm creatures covered in toxic sludge
descZh: 令投射物迷惑覆盖毒性淤泥的生物

name: Explosion on slimy enemies
desc: Makes a projectile explode upon collision with creatures covered in slime
descZh: 令投射物在碰撞覆盖粘液的生物时爆炸

name: Giant explosion on slimy enemies
desc: Makes a projectile explode powerfully upon collision with creatures covered in slime
descZh: 令投射物在碰撞覆盖粘液的生物时发生强烈爆炸

name: Explosion on drunk enemies
desc: Makes a projectile explode upon collision with creatures covered in alcohol
descZh: 令投射物在碰撞覆盖酒液的生物时爆炸

name: Giant explosion on drunk enemies
desc: Makes a projectile explode powerfully upon collision with creatures covered in alcohol
descZh: 令投射物在碰撞覆盖酒液的生物时发生强烈爆炸

name: Petrify
desc: Turns a wounded enemy into stone
descZh: 将受伤的敌人变为石头

name: Downwards bolt bundle
desc: Makes a projectile separate into a bundle of 5 explosive bolts as soon as it moves downwards
descZh: 令投射物在向下移动时分裂成 5 个一组的爆裂魔弹

name: Octagonal bolt bundle
desc: Makes a projectile launch 8 magical bolts if it moves slowly enough
descZh: 令投射物在移动速度慢至一定程度时发出 8 发魔弹

name: Fizzle
desc: Gives a spell a small probability of short-circuiting
descZh: 法术有小几率短路

name: Explosive bounce
desc: Makes a projectile explode as it bounces
descZh: 令投射物在弹跳时爆炸

name: Bubbly bounce
desc: Makes a projectile shoot bubble sparks as it bounces
descZh: 令投射物在弹跳时射出泡泡火花

name: Concentrated light bounce
desc: Makes a projectile release a bundle of concentrated light as it bounces
descZh: 令投射物在弹跳时发出一系列凝聚光线

name: Plasma Beam Bounce
desc: A projectile launches a plasma beam upon bouncing
descZh: 在弹跳时发出电浆束的投射物

name: Larpa Bounce
desc: A projectile will launch a copy of itself when it bounces
descZh: 投射物在弹跳时发出自己的复制品

name: Sparkly bounce
desc: Makes a projectile release damaging sparks as it bounces
descZh: 令投射物在弹跳时射出破坏性的火花

name: Lightning bounce
desc: Makes a projectile release powerful lightning as it bounces
descZh: 令投射物在弹跳时射出强力闪电

name: Vacuum bounce
desc: Makes a projectile remove earth as it bounces
descZh: 令投射物在弹跳时清除泥土

name: Fireball thrower
desc: Makes a projectile cast fireballs in random directions
descZh: 令投射物向随机方向发射火球

name: Lightning thrower
desc: Makes a projectile cast lightning in random directions
descZh: 令投射物向随机方向发射闪电

name: Tentacler
desc: Makes a projectile cast tentacles in random directions
descZh: 令投射物向随机方向伸出触手

name: Plasma Beam Thrower
desc: A projectile fires plasma beams in all directions!
descZh: 向所有方向发射电浆束的投射物！

name: Two-way fireball thrower
desc: Makes a projectile fire small fireballs perpendicular to its trajectory
descZh: 令投射物发射垂直于轨道的小火球

name: Personal fireball thrower
desc: Makes a projectile turn the creatures it hits into living fireball throwers
descZh: 令投射物将击中的生物变为活着的火球发射器

name: Personal lightning caster
desc: Makes a projectile turn the creatures it hits into living thunderstorms
descZh: 令投射物将击中的生物变为活着的雷电风暴

name: Personal tentacler
desc: Makes creatures hit by a projectile grow tentacles in a chaotic manner
descZh: 令被投射物击中的生物以混乱的方式长出触手

name: Personal gravity field
desc: Makes creatures hit by a projectile gain a temporary gravity well that draws projectiles in
descZh: 令投射物击中的生物获得暂时性的重力井，吸引投射物

name: Venomous Curse
desc: Imbues a projectile with a curse that makes the target hit by the projectile to waste away
descZh: 为一个投射物施加诅咒，令其击中的目标逐渐衰弱

name: Weakening Curse - Projectiles
desc: Target hit by a projectile takes 25% extra projectile damage for a time
descZh: 被投射物击中的目标短时间内会受到额外的 25% 投射物伤害

name: Weakening Curse - Explosives
desc: Target hit by a projectile takes 25% extra explosion damage for a time
descZh: 被投射物击中的目标短时间内会受到额外的 25% 爆炸伤害

name: Weakening Curse - Melee
desc: Target hit by a projectile takes 25% extra melee damage for a time
descZh: 被投射物击中的目标短时间内会受到额外的 25% 近战伤害

name: Weakening Curse - Electricity
desc: Target hit by a projectile takes 25% extra electricity damage for a time
descZh: 被投射物击中的目标短时间内会受到额外的 25% 电力伤害

name: Sawblade Orbit
desc: Makes four sawblades rotate around a projectile
descZh: 令四片锯刃环绕一个投射物旋转

name: Fireball Orbit
desc: Makes four fireballs rotate around a projectile
descZh: 令四个火球环绕一个投射物旋转

name: Nuke Orbit
desc: Makes four… nukes(?!) rotate around a projectile
descZh: 令四个... 核弹(?!)环绕一个投射物旋转

name: Plasma Beam Orbit
desc: Makes four plasma beams rotate around a projectile
descZh: 令四道电浆束环绕一个投射物旋转

name: Orbit Larpa
desc: Makes four copies of a projectile rotate around it
descZh: 令投射物的四个复制品环绕其旋转

name: Chain Spell
desc: Causes a projectile to cast a copy of itself upon expiring, up to 5 times
descZh: 令一个投射物在消失时施放自己的复制品，最多 5 次

name: Electric Arc
desc: Creates arcs of lightning between projectiles (requires 2 projectile spells)
descZh: 在投射物之间产生电弧（需要 2 个投射法术）

name: Fire Arc
desc: Creates arcs of fire between projectiles (requires 2 projectile spells)
descZh: 在投射物之间产生火弧（需要 2 个投射法术）

name: Gunpowder Arc
desc: Creates arcs of gunpowder between projectiles (requires 2 projectile spells)
descZh: 在投射物之间产生火药弧（需要 2 个投射法术）

name: Poison Arc
desc: Creates arcs of poison between projectiles (requires 2 projectile spells)
descZh: 在投射物之间产生毒液弧（需要 2 个投射法术）

name: Earthquake shot
desc: Makes a projectile crumble the earth it hits
descZh: 投射物令击中的土地崩溃粉碎

name: All-seeing eye
desc: See into the unexplored. But not everywhere...
descZh: 窥视未曾探索区域，但并非毫无限制...

name: Firecrackers
desc: Makes a projectile release firecrackers when it disappears
descZh: 令投射物在消失时放出爆竹

name: Acid trail
desc: Gives a projectile a trail of acid
descZh: 投射物留下酸液轨迹

name: Poison trail
desc: Gives a projectile a trail of poison
descZh: 投射物留下毒素轨迹

name: Oil trail
desc: Gives a projectile a trail of oil
descZh: 投射物留下油液轨迹

name: Water trail
desc: Gives a projectile a trail of water
descZh: 投射物留下清水轨迹

name: Gunpowder trail
desc: Gives a projectile a trail of gunpowder
descZh: 投射物留下火药轨迹

name: Fire trail
desc: Gives a projectile a trail of fiery particles
descZh: 投射物留下炽热粒子的轨迹

name: Burning trail
desc: Gives a projectile a tail of fire
descZh: 投射物留下火焰轨迹

name: Torch
desc: Lights your wand right up!
descZh: 让你的魔杖亮起来！

name: Electric Torch
desc: Gives your wand a bright but very dangerous light!
descZh: 为魔杖赋予明亮而极度危险的光！

name: Energy shield
desc: Deflects incoming projectiles
descZh: 偏斜射来的投射物

name: Energy shield sector
desc: Deflects incoming projectiles
descZh: 偏斜射来的投射物

name: Projectile energy shield
desc: Gives a projectile a shield that deflects other projectiles
descZh: 为投射物赋予护盾，偏转其他投射物

name: Summon Tiny Ghost
desc: Summons a tiny ethereal being to your help. It may cast stronger spells depending on how much damage you have suffered.
descZh: 召唤一个小小的虚无存在帮手。它会根据你已经受到的伤害施放更强大的法术。

name: Ocarina - note A
desc: Music for your ears!
descZh: 悦耳的音乐！

name: Ocarina - note B
desc: Music for your ears!
descZh: 悦耳的音乐！

name: Ocarina - note C
desc: Music for your ears!
descZh: 悦耳的音乐！

name: Ocarina - note D
desc: Music for your ears!
descZh: 悦耳的音乐！

name: Ocarina - note E
desc: Music for your ears!
descZh: 悦耳的音乐！

name: Ocarina - note F
desc: Music for your ears!
descZh: 悦耳的音乐！

name: Ocarina - note G#
desc: Music for your ears!
descZh: 悦耳的音乐！

name: Ocarina - note A2
desc: Music for your ears!
descZh: 悦耳的音乐！

name: Kantele - note A
desc: Music for your ears!
descZh: 悦耳的音乐！

name: Kantele - note D
desc: Music for your ears!
descZh: 悦耳的音乐！

name: Kantele - note D#
desc: Music for your ears!
descZh: 悦耳的音乐！

name: Kantele - note E
desc: Music for your ears!
descZh: 悦耳的音乐！

name: Kantele - note G
desc: Music for your ears!
descZh: 悦耳的音乐！

name: Random spell
desc: Casts a spell, any spell, at random!
descZh: 随机施放一个法术 – 随便什么法术！

name: Random projectile spell
desc: Casts one random projectile spell
descZh: 施放一个随机投射物法术

name: Random modifier spell
desc: Casts one random modifier spell
descZh: 施放一个随机修正法术

name: Random static projectile spell
desc: Casts one random static projectile spell
descZh: 施放一个随机静态投射物法术

name: Copy random spell
desc: Casts a random spell among the spells in your wand
descZh: 施放你魔杖中法术中的一个随机法术

name: Copy random spell thrice
desc: Casts a random spell among the spells in your wand three times!
descZh: 施放你魔杖中法术中的一个随机法术三次！

name: Copy three random spells
desc: Casts three random spells among the spells in your wand
descZh: 施放你魔杖中法术中的三个随机法术

name: Spells to nukes
desc: Transforms every projectile currently in the air into a nuke, not a good idea
descZh: 将目前正在空中飞行的每个投射物化为核弹；不算是个好点子

name: Spells to giga sawblades
desc: Transforms every projectile currently in the air into a giant sawblade
descZh: 将目前正在空中飞行的每个投射物化为巨型锯刃

name: Spells to magic missiles
desc: Transforms every projectile currently in the air into a magic missile
descZh: 将目前正在空中飞行的每个投射物化为魔法飞弹

name: Spells to death crosses
desc: Transforms every projectile currently in the air into a death cross
descZh: 将目前正在空中飞行的每个投射物化为死亡十字

name: Spells to black holes
desc: Transforms every projectile currently in the air into a black hole
descZh: 将目前正在空中飞行的每个投射物化为黑洞

name: Spells to acid
desc: Transforms every projectile currently in the air into a pool of acid
descZh: 将目前正在空中飞行的每个投射物化为一池酸液

name: The end of everything
desc: You're heavily advised not to cast this spell.
descZh: 强烈建议不要施放这个法术。

name: Summon portal
desc: Summons a strange portal
descZh: 召唤一个怪异的传送门

name: Add trigger
desc: Makes a projectile cast another spell upon collision
descZh: 令投射物在碰撞时施放另一法术

name: Add timer
desc: Makes a projectile cast another spell after a short time
descZh: 令投射物在短暂时间后施放另一法术

name: Add expiration trigger
desc: Makes a projectile cast another spell upon expiring
descZh: 令投射物在失效时施放另一法术

name: Chaos larpa
desc: Makes a projectile cast copies of itself in random directions
descZh: 令投射物向随机方向施放自身的复制品

name: Downwards larpa
desc: Makes a projectile cast copies of itself with a downwards trajectory
descZh: 令投射物以向下的轨迹施放自身的复制品

name: Upwards larpa
desc: Makes a projectile cast copies of itself with an upwards trajectory
descZh: 令投射物以向上的轨迹施放自身的复制品

name: Copy trail
desc: Makes a projectile leave a trail of copies of itself
descZh: 投射物留下由自身复制品构成的轨迹

name: Larpa Explosion
desc: A projectile will shoot out 8 copies of itself when it expires or hits the ground
descZh: 投射物在消失或击中地面时会射出自身的 8 个复制品

name: Alpha
desc: Casts a copy of the first spell in your wand
descZh: 施放你魔杖中第一个法术的复制品

name: Gamma
desc: Casts a copy of the last spell in your wand
descZh: 施放你魔杖中最后一个法术的复制品

name: Tau
desc: Copies the two following spells in the wand when cast
descZh: 施放时复制魔杖中的两个跟随法术

name: Omega
desc: Casts copies of every spell in your wand
descZh: 施放你魔杖中的每个法术

name: Mu
desc: Every modifier-type spell in the current wand is applied to a projectile
descZh: 当前魔杖中的所有修饰类型法术应用到投射物

name: Phi
desc: Casts a copy of every projectile-type spell in the current wand
descZh: 施放当前魔杖中所有投射物类型法术的复制品

name: Sigma
desc: Copies every static projectile -type spell in the wand when cast
descZh: 施放时复制魔杖中的每个静态投射物类型法术

name: Zeta
desc: Copies a random spell in another wand you're holding
descZh: 复制持有的另一魔杖中的一个随机法术

name: Divide by 2
desc: Casts the next spell twice, but with reduced damage
descZh: 将下个法术施放两次，但伤害降低

name: Divide by 3
desc: Casts the next spell 3 times, but with reduced damage
descZh: 将下个法术施放 3 次，但伤害降低

name: Divide by 4
desc: Casts the next spell 4 times, but with reduced damage
descZh: 将下个法术施放 4 次，但伤害降低

name: Divide by 10
desc: Casts the next spell 10 times, but with reduced damage
descZh: 将下个法术施放 10 次，但伤害降低

name: Meteorisade
desc: Alea iacta est

name: Matosade
desc: Alea iacta est

name: Wand Refresh
desc: Reloads the wand immediately
descZh: 立即装填魔杖

name: Requirement - Enemies
desc: The next spell is skipped if there are less than 15 enemies nearby
descZh: 如果附近的敌人少于 15 个，则下个法术将被跳过

name: Requirement - Projectile Spells
nameZh: 要求 - 投射物法术数量
desc: The next spell is skipped if there are less than 20 projectiles nearby
descZh: 如果附近的投射物少于 20 个，则下个法术将被跳过

name: Requirement - Low Health
desc: The next spell is skipped if you have more than 25% health left
descZh: 如果剩余的生命值超过 25%，则下个法术将被跳过

name: Requirement - Every Other
desc: The next spell is skipped every other time this spell is cast
descZh: 每隔一次该法术被施放时，跳过下个法术

name: Requirement - Endpoint
desc: Any Requirement spells before this will skip all spells between them and this spell
descZh: 在此之前的任何要求将会跳过自身至该法术之间的所有法术

name: Requirement - Otherwise
desc: If a Requirement spell before this succeeds, the next spell is skipped
descZh: 若在此之前有要求法术达成，则下个法术被跳过

name: Red Glimmer
desc: Gives a projectile a red sparkly trail
descZh: 投射物留下红色闪烁轨迹

name: Orange Glimmer
desc: Gives a projectile a orange sparkly trail
descZh: 投射物留下橙色闪烁轨迹

name: Green Glimmer
desc: Gives a projectile a green sparkly trail
descZh: 投射物留下绿色闪烁轨迹

name: Yellow Glimmer
desc: Gives a projectile a yellow sparkly trail
descZh: 投射物留下黄色闪烁轨迹

name: Purple Glimmer
desc: Gives a projectile a purple sparkly trail
descZh: 投射物留下紫色闪烁轨迹

name: Blue Glimmer
desc: Gives a projectile a blue sparkly trail
descZh: 投射物留下蓝色闪烁轨迹

name: Rainbow Glimmer
desc: Gives a projectile a randomly colored sparkly trail
descZh: 投射物留下随机颜色的闪烁轨迹

name: Invisible Spell
desc: Turns a projectile invisible
descZh: 将一个投射物隐形

name: Rainbow trail
desc: Gives a projectile a trail of rainbow
descZh: 投射物留下彩虹轨迹

name: Cessation
desc: The caster enters the realm of no realm
descZh: 施法者进入无界之界
